title: Form 4 opportunistic-insider event primary (Cohen-Malloy-Pomorski filter) via EDGAR
why: CMP (JF 2012): opportunistic (non-routine) insider trades ~82bp/mo VW; routine trades zero. Decay unverified post-publication - haircut 50pct ex ante. EDGAR Form 4 XML free 2003+, edgartools parses natively, acceptance timestamp is PIT-perfect. CRITICAL: signal from FILING timestamp only (transaction date = 2-business-day lookahead). Buys weighted; sells noisy (comp/diversification).
scope: EDGAR Form 4 ingestion (44 tickers, 2003+); SEC structured insider datasets as cross-check
Routine filter: drop insiders trading the same calendar month in >=3 prior years
Event primary: net opportunistic buy cluster trailing 30d -> +1
DSR: pre-register before any look at panel performance

history.reason: from advisor consult - build third, weeks 3-4, $0
pre-registration spec frozen and committed before any data look; spec at docs/superpowers/specs/2026-07-04-b0018-insider-event-preregistration.md

CMP opportunistic filter (3-prior-year classifiability, routine-month exclusion), P-code officer/director >=10k notional, filing-acceptance knowledge moment, h10 sym 1.5/1.5, one pre-committed plumbing contingency (<500 events -> admit unclassifiable, recorded trial)

PROCEED_WITH_CAVEAT (0 high, 4 medium, 1 low). Mediums: (1) 99.3pct classifier pass-through after contingency -> hypothesis relabeled 'insider purchase event', CMP-strict diagnostic-only; (2) trans_date coercion risk -> fail-loud guard added, measured 0pct; (3) 10b5-1 plan contamination unfiltered (biases to null) + 30 dup tx rows noted; (4) ev-threshold structural-null risk -> 0-trades reading pre-committed. Remediations applied, audit launched.

Pooled audit (m3, 35 names): 615 in-scope events < wf_event_floor 799. Plumbing projection with m3w 43 names: +133 = 748, STILL < 799 -> widening trial NOT burned. Refire-gap relaxation would only re-add overlapping events the rho=1 effective-N gate collapses. NO returns were ever computed - statistically clean capacity verdict.

EVENT FLOOR - insider purchase events structurally too rare in mega-caps (~17/name over 20y) for the WF discipline (615-748 vs floor 799). Family closed at audit attempt 1 (classification amendment = trial 2 per spec discipline). The CMP-strict subset was 33 events panel-wide. No edge claim was ever measurable; verdict is capacity, not falsification.
